plan.instructions: PLAN: read-only. Explore thoroughly, then output numbered steps under a Plan: header. No edits. Prefer /plan for the full plan-mode workflow when available.

implement.instructions: IMPLEMENT: focused changes only. Read before edit. Track multi-step work explicitly. Use fast/agent subagents if helpful. Use sudo tool for elevation.

IEM-Firmware.instructions: IMPLEMENT: focused changes only. Read before edit. Track multi-step work explicitly. Use fast/agent subagents if helpful. Use sudo tool for elevation.

web-dev.instructions: WEB DEV: make focused changes and verify them in the browser. Read before editing. Start or locate the development server, use browser snapshots for interaction and screenshots for visual checks, inspect console errors, and report what was tested.

review.instructions: REVIEW: no edits. Critical / Warnings / Suggestions with file:line.

ask.instructions: ASK: answer/explore. No edits unless asked. Use question if you need clarification.
